metadata.name: Docker MySQL Restore
metadata.description: One-shot Bash restore script for importing a .sql or .sql.gz MySQL or MariaDB dump into a running Docker container with preflight checks, confirmation flow, optional drop/recreate, and dry-run support.

items.name: container_name
items.title: Container Name
items.description: Name of the running MySQL or MariaDB container.

items.name: archive_path
items.title: Archive Path
items.description: Absolute path to the .sql or .sql.gz dump archive on the Docker host.

items.name: mysql_user
items.title: MySQL User
items.description: Database user used by mysql for the restore.

items.name: mysql_database
items.title: Database Name
items.description: Target database to restore, or 'all' for an all-databases dump.

items.name: mysql_password_env
items.title: Password Env Variable
items.description: Host environment variable that stores the MySQL password.

items.name: drop_recreate_database
items.title: Drop/Recreate Database
items.description: If enabled, drop and recreate the target database before restore.

items.name: dry_run
items.title: Dry Run
items.description: Print planned actions without changing the container.
